Send Marcel a summary of the details for the fully managed offering, including the proposed revenue split for future deals
Collaborate on building koala prospecting workflow templates and share best practices between Marcel's team and Deepgram
Continue promoting Marcel's talk and identify other relevant conferences for him to speak at
Research suitable course hosting platforms for Marcel's on-demand workshop
